summary: Content List feature testing complete for Admin Content Builder refactor. Backend APIs (GET /api/admin/layouts, DELETE soft-delete, POST copy) all working. Frontend Content List panel visible with all required columns and actions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content List feature fully implemented. Admin login via /admin/login route. Content List panel at bottom of /admin/site-design/content-builder page. All data-testids properly in place.

backend_api_list_layouts.details: Returns draft+published layouts with pagination, include_deleted parameter works

backend_api_soft_delete.details: Sets is_deleted=true on revision, returns updated item

backend_api_copy.details: Creates copy with target_page_type, country, module, category_id parameters

frontend_content_list_table.details: Table shows columns: page_type, country, module, scope, status, version, updated_at, actions

frontend_edit_button.details: Edit button loads page into builder canvas

frontend_delete_button.details: Delete button triggers soft-delete with confirmation

frontend_copy_button.details: Kopyala (Copy) button uses copy target fields for bire bir kopyalama

frontend_include_deleted_checkbox.details: Checkbox filters deleted items in list

frontend_copy_target_panel.details: Copy target fields: page_type, country, module, category_id, publish_after_copy

frontend_deleted_row_styling.details: Deleted rows have line-through and bg-rose-50 styling
